---
title: "Programming Practice: Lab 1"
execute:
  enabled: true
  echo: false
  cache: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
diagram:
  cache: true
  cache-dir: ./cache
  engine:
    tikz:
      execpath: lualatex
filters:
  - diagram
---

## Environment setup

### Required tools

1. uv (<https://docs.astral.sh/uv/getting-started/installation/>)
2. git (<https://git-scm.com/install/windows>)

### Project setup

1. Run Git Bash, this should be installed as part of "Git for Windows".
2. `mkdir labs`.
3. `cd labs`.
4. `uv init`.

## Lab task

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A(Input) -->|read| B[Program]
    B -->|write| C(Output)
```

Please write a simple Python script that will sum integers. It should:

1. Access input either as command-line arguments, or as a file
   - cmd line example: `prog.py 5 6`
   - file example: `prog.py -f file.txt`

  In case of file argument, each line in a file should contain a number to be added

2. Produce output either to console, or to a file.
   - console output: just print the number and exit
   - file output: `prog.py -f file.txt -o out.txt`. In this case `out.txt` should contain the result.

3. For command line argument parsing, use `argparse` (<https://docs.python.org/3/howto/argparse.html>). Bonus points for implementation using `Typer` (<https://typer.tiangolo.com/>)
